code:
%%{Infra_EtcdCluster}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant RegistrationForm as Registration Form
    participant FortifyController as Fortify Controller
    participant UserRepository as User Repository
    participant EmailVerification as Email Verification
    participant Database as Database

    User->>RegistrationForm: Fill registration form
    RegistrationForm->>FortifyController: Submit registration data
    FortifyController->>FortifyController: Validate input
    FortifyController->>UserRepository: Create user
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate snowflake ID
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate slug
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Hash password
    UserRepository->>Database: Save user
    Database-->>UserRepository: Confirm save
    UserRepository-->>FortifyController: Return user
    FortifyController->>EmailVerification: Send verification email
    EmailVerification-->>User: Email with verification link
    FortifyController-->>RegistrationForm: Registration successful
    RegistrationForm-->>User: Show success message

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个用户注册的完整流程图。从用户在注册表单填写信息开始，一直到收到验证邮件为止。核心逻辑是Fortify Controller来处理，后面接User Repository和Database。
明白了。我确认一下结构：六个参与者——User、Registration Form、Fortify Controller、User Repository、Email Verification和Database。用户填写表单后提交给Fortify Controller，对吧？
对的。Fortify Controller要先做输入校验，然后调用User Repository创建用户。这里要注意，Repository内部有三个关键操作：生成snowflake ID、生成slug、还有密码哈希。
好的，我先把主干画出来：User填写Registration Form，表单提交数据到Fortify Controller，Controller自循环做Validate input，然后调用User Repository的Create user。Repository内部三个自循环步骤我也加上了，接着Repository保存到Database。
等等，Database保存成功后要有确认返回给Repository，然后Repository把用户对象返回给Fortify Controller。这个双向箭头别漏了。
已补充：Database用虚线箭头Confirm save返回给UserRepository，然后Repository再用虚线箭头Return user给Fortify Controller。接下来是邮件验证部分吗？
是的。Fortify Controller要调用Email Verification服务发送验证邮件，最后邮件到达用户，同时前端要显示注册成功。整个流程闭环回到User。
完成。最终流程：Fortify Controller发送验证邮件给Email Verification服务，邮件以虚线箭头到达User；同时Controller返回注册成功给Registration Form，表单再显示成功消息给用户。六个参与者、十三步交互，全部对齐。
